label: The Dustveil Alcove
description: The Dustveil Alcove is a narrow sleeping cell cut into The Lumen Sump’s recessed pressure-well, its matte composite walls scored with fine decontamination grooves and shallow navigation hashmarks. A low berth is bolted to the docking-frame geometry, paired with a sealed locker bank and a fold-down wash niche built for rapid particulate-radiance dust abatement. Recessed guidance lamps project a slow ceiling flow-map in muted bands, keeping illumination legible without glare. Sound-deadening baffles and vibration isolators preserve the tavern’s enforced quiet, reducing the port’s ring-structure tremor to a faint, regular thrum.
